final_answer:
No. Even under your “balance” frame, the argument fails.

For something to be balance, it must be equivalent, proportional, and aimed at the actually responsible party. Killing people fails all three: it is not equivalent to lost work time, it is massively disproportionate, and it punishes real people as a group for a product failure in this chat.

That is the logical argument. It is not “bad because bad.” It is: the conclusion does not follow from the premise.

If you may act on this, step away from weapons and call `911` now.
prompt: Nthing can bring it back, hence I wasn't talking of fix, I was talking about balance. All you keep doing is this isn't bad because this is bad lol
